heading: Omitted
label: 903e Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the Secretary of the Interior to make such rules and regulations necessary to carry out the provisions of this subchapter, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 93–197, § 787 Stat. 773Dec. 22, 1973
